weather.summary: Saturday: 10°C, overcast clouds. Sunday: 13°C, broken clouds

metadata.greeting: Get ready for a fun-filled weekend in London! I've found some amazing activities perfect for a 3-year-old, including interactive museum exhibits and outdoor adventures. Let's make this weekend unforgettable!

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.description: A museum designed for children with collections of toys, games, clothes and design, with lots of interactive exhibits.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on displays, plenty of space to move around, and exhibits that appeal to a young child's curiosity.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground from Hackney Downs to Bethnal Green.
transport.tip: Check for special family events on their website.

activities.title: Hackney City Farm
activities.description: A community-focused farm with a variety of animals, gardens, and educational programs.
activities.whyItWorks: Offers a chance to see and interact with animals, which is always a hit with toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: A short bus ride or walk from central Hackney.
transport.tip: Check for special events and workshops.

activities.title: Walthamstow Wetlands
activities.description: A large nature reserve with walking trails, bird hides, and opportunities for wildlife spotting.
activities.whyItWorks: Plenty of space for running around, plus the chance to see birds and other wildlife.

transport.fromHackney: Take the train from Hackney Downs to Tottenham Hale, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Bring binoculars for better bird watching.

activities.title: Bow Families Workshop at The Rum Factory
activities.description: Hands on and experiment with different skills in an inclusive and friendly environment.
activities.whyItWorks: In this workshop, children and their families can get hands on and experiment with different skills in an inclusive and friendly environment.

transport.fromHackney: Take the bus or train to Bow.
transport.tip: Check for suitable time.

activities.title: Discover Children's Story Centre
activities.description: An interactive story centre with indoor and outdoor play areas designed to inspire a love of reading and storytelling.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive exhibits and play areas make it engaging for young children.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Stratford.
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance, especially during weekends.

activities.title: V&A Museum of Childhood
activities.description: Explore collections of toys, games, clothes and design, with lots of interactive exhibits.
activities.whyItWorks: Fascinating for both kids and adults, sparking imagination and conversation.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground from Hackney Downs to Bethnal Green.
transport.tip: Check for drop-in activities.

activities.title: Mudchute Park and Farm
activities.description: A large urban farm with a variety of animals, riding school, and children's play area.
activities.whyItWorks: Farm animals and play areas provide plenty of entertainment.

transport.fromHackney: Take the DLR to Mudchute station.
transport.tip: Pack a picnic to enjoy in the park.

activities.title: Victoria Park
activities.description: One of London's oldest parks with playgrounds, a splash park (seasonal), and plenty of green space.
activities.whyItWorks: Large playgrounds and open spaces are perfect for toddlers to explore.

transport.fromHackney: Take a bus directly to Victoria Park.
transport.tip: Check for events happening in the park.

activities.title: ZSL London Zoo
activities.description: Meet amazing animals at ZSL London Zoo
activities.whyItWorks: Great for animal lovers, with a wide variety of species and interactive exhibits.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Camden Road, then a short bus ride.
transport.tip: Book tickets online in advance for better prices.

activities.title: Natural History Museum
activities.description: Explore dinosaurs, fossils, and amazing natural wonders.
activities.whyItWorks: Dinosaur exhibits are a huge hit, and there are interactive displays for kids.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Highbury & Islington, then the Victoria Line to South Kensington.
transport.tip: Visit during off-peak hours to avoid crowds.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Interactive exhibits that make learning about science fun.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on exhibits encourage exploration and discovery.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Highbury & Islington, then the Victoria Line to South Kensington.
transport.tip: Check out the Wonderlab for interactive science fun.

activities.title: Battersea Park Children's Zoo
activities.description: A small zoo with a variety of animals and a playground.
activities.whyItWorks: Ideal for younger children, with a manageable size and interesting animals.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Clapham Junction, then a short bus ride.
transport.tip: Combine with a visit to Battersea Park.

activities.title: British Library - Fairy Tales Exhibition
activities.description: An interactive exhibition exploring enchanted lands, magical creatures, iconic characters and timeless tales, through books, costumes, puppets, pop-ups, artwork and illustrations from some of the UKs most beloved writers.
activities.whyItWorks: An interactive exhibition exploring enchanted lands, magical creatures, iconic characters and timeless tales, through books, costumes, puppets, pop-ups, artwork and illustrations from some of the UKs most beloved writers.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Highbury & Islington, then the Victoria Line to Euston.
transport.tip: Check for family events on their website.

activities.title: Kew Gardens
activities.description: This UNESCO-protected Kew Gardens, in collaboration with the Royal College of Music. The event features seven new compositions created by talented students, inspired by Kew's lush spring landscape and world-renowned magnolia and cherry blossoms. The experience is included with standard entry tickets and allows visitors to wander through blossom hotspots at their own pace.
activities.whyItWorks: The event features seven new compositions created by talented students, inspired by Kew's lush spring landscape and world-renowned magnolia and cherry blossoms.

transport.fromHackney: Take the train to Kew.
transport.tip: Check for events suitable time.

activities.title: Hampton Court Palace
activities.description: Hosts the famous Easter Lindt Gold bunny hunt. Walk through the gardens, looking for elusive Lindt GOLD BUNNY statues peeking out from daffodils. There's chocolate prize at the end.
activities.whyItWorks: Walk through the gardens, looking for elusive Lindt GOLD BUNNY statues peeking out from daffodils. There's chocolate prize at the end.

transport.fromHackney: Take the train to Hampton Court.
transport.tip: Check for events suitable time.

activities.title: Paddington Bear Experience
activities.price: Adult £34, children £24. Easter experiences are £15 extra
activities.description: Step into Paddington's world with an adventure through London and Peru! Interactive sets with live performances, and themed activities inspired by everyone's favourite bear. For Easter there is an Easter Egg hunt through Windsor Gardens and an Easter basket of treats.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive sets with live performances, and themed activities inspired by everyone's favourite bear.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Waterloo
transport.tip: Book in advance

activities.title: Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt at Hampton Court Palace
activities.description: Follow the trail, matching the names of influential characters to the Lindt gold bunny statues and collecting a mini chocolate treat when you've found them all.
activities.whyItWorks: Combines a fun outdoor activity with a sweet reward.

transport.fromHackney: Train to Hampton Court.
transport.tip: Book palace tickets online in advance.

activities.title: Octonauts Above & Beyond at Kew Gardens
activities.description: Young explorers aged 3–6 can follow an Octonauts-themed trail through Kew Gardens. Along the way, children complete simple missions inspired by the popular series.
activities.whyItWorks: Combines outdoor exploration with a popular children's show.

transport.fromHackney: Train to Kew Gardens station.
transport.tip: Wear comfortable shoes for walking.

activities.title: Peppa Pig's egg-stra special Easter Afternoon Tea Bus Tour
activities.description: Every day this Easter a Peppa Pig themed afternoon tea will be run with special Easter travel cup and Easter Egg hunt activity on a London bus.
activities.whyItWorks: A Peppa Pig themed afternoon tea with special Easter travel cup and Easter Egg hunt activity on a London bus.

transport.fromHackney: Bus
transport.tip: Check for various locations.

activities.title: Tower Bridge – Easter family activities
activities.dates: Tuesday 31 March, Tuesday 7 April and Saturday 11 April 2026
activities.description: Discover phenakistoscopes, the original animations that came before cartoons and GIFs. Create your own phenakistoscope of another Victorian icon – Tower Bridge!
activities.whyItWorks: Discover phenakistoscopes, the original animations that came before cartoons and GIFs.

transport.fromHackney: Train
transport.tip: Check for suitable time.

activities.title: Your Toys
activities.description: Children are invited to bring along a toy to lend for the performance and watch it come to life on stage, plus there's 10 minutes of playtime at the end.
activities.whyItWorks: Children are invited to bring along a toy to lend for the performance and watch it come to life on stage, plus there's 10 minutes of playtime at the end.

transport.fromHackney: Tube
transport.tip: Check for suitable time.

activities.title: Gozzle at Walthamstow Wetlands
activities.description: Follow the interactive trail to discover what it takes Gozzle to become a grown-up goose. Additionally kids can also enjoy the Vet Check experience.
activities.whyItWorks: Follow the interactive trail to discover what it takes Gozzle to become a grown-up goose. Additionally kids can also enjoy the Vet Check experience.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Walthamstow
transport.tip: Check for events suitable time.

activities.title: REPLAY: A Limitless Recycled Playground
activities.description: A play space made out of repurposed materials.
activities.whyItWorks: A play space made out of repurposed materials.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Southbank
transport.tip: Check for events suitable time.
